candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: More direct and preferable STD measure because it explicitly captures current portion of debt and excludes capitalized leases per instruction.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest direct STD measure and explicitly excludes leases, which matches the baseline definition better than the maturity schedule line.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Most plausible PPE-type balance-sheet label; 'Net' presentation fits PPEGT, though it is ambiguous in a real-estate-heavy IFRS filer.
Owner-occupied buildings are PPE, but this appears to be only a component rather than total PPE.
Under IFRS this is typically separate from PPE and should not be used for PPEGT.

variables.notes: R:nc. No clean explicit PPE total is provided in the shortlist or statements preview. 'Land & Buildings - Net' is the best likely PPE proxy, with 'Buildings for own use' as fallback, but classification is ambiguous because this appears to be a property company with substantial investment property.
